MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-09-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-03-2002 Failure To Post Jury Fees

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-13-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Lewis Gillian. Scott Baker, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff, White Space, Inc. Also present, Sheila Vondriska, President of Widespace Inc. The following exhibits were introduced and marked for identification and moved into evidence:1) Spreadsheet; 2) Checks in support of summary - copies of cancelled checks; 3) Card Account Summary and Details - American Express; 4) Chevron statements; 5) Excerpts from Bank Statements; 6) Promissory Note 0 Sept. 18, 2001; 7) Letter from Horowitz & Shaw dated November 5, 2001' 8) Quickbooks records and 9) Alameda County Property Transfer Record. The Court took evidence and grants judgment as follows: Principal: $44, 344.23; reasonable investigation expenses: $6,688.00. Interest and costs to be determined. Counsel to prepare Order for signature.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Sep-18-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Dean Shotwell, Esq. 925/606-6107 moving to withdraw as attorney of record for deft; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling (GRANT). Order signed in open court. (AJR/ju)
